title: P22: fail-open dispatch audit log in bee-model-guard
action: RED-first: add row20 group to hooks/test_model_guard.mjs asserting .bee/logs/dispatch.jsonl lines (model-param transport with model name; marker transport with extracted tier; bare-denied on deny; description truncated to 120 chars; disabled fixture writes nothing) — run, must fail. Then in hooks/bee-model-guard.mjs: refactor hasTierMarker -> markerTier returning the captured tier or null; add logDispatch(root, entry) with the logDeny fail-open shape writing {ts,tool,transport,model,tier,subagent_type,description<=120} to .bee/logs/dispatch.jsonl; call at the model-param return, the marker return, and the deny branch. Deny/allow semantics and exit codes unchanged; a log failure never changes the exit code. Re-vendor: cp hooks/bee-model-guard.mjs .bee/bin/hooks/bee-model-guard.mjs

truths: Every evaluated Agent/Task dispatch (allowed or denied) appends one parseable line to .bee/logs/dispatch.jsonl with its transport and model/tier; guard semantics unchanged

row20 group covering all five assertions
